{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Crystal Halls
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Crystal Halls]] is [[Iri]]'s stronghold.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Crystal Halls]] is a palace of fluted blue crystal carved from an astronomically large [[diamond]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
